design_philosophy: A cinematic, immersive storytelling platform. The user interface acts as a professional 'Viewing Room' and 'Studio Control Center'. We use deep dark tones (Obsidian, Midnight) to let the video/image content pop. The UI uses 1px crisp borders, glassmorphism for floating elements, and a structural 'Bento' or 'Control Room' grid to manage complex inputs and video generations.

spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use p-6 to p-12 for containers, gap-6 to gap-12 for grid layouts.

grids.marketing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 with asymmetrical spans.
grids.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 (Control Room Mode).

spacing_and_layout.containers: All bordered containers must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8). Max radius 8px for a crisp, professional studio feel.

components_strategy.navigation: Sticky crystal glass header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 with 1px border-white/10 at the bottom. Nav links must be visible on desktop.
components_strategy.buttons: Primary buttons: Gold bg with black text, hover slightly brighter. Secondary: Transparent with 1px border-white/20 and white text.
components_strategy.cards: Flat solid surfaces (#121212) or subtle glass. 1px border-white/10. No heavy box-shadows, use inner glow or subtle border highlight on hover.
components_strategy.inputs: Shadcn components heavily customized. bg-black/50, border-white/10, focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50.
components_strategy.modals_dialogs: Use Shadcn Dialog. Backdrop bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm. Surface #121212 with 1px border-white/10.
components_strategy.data_testid: Apply data-testid attributes to all interactive and key informational elements (kebab-case, role-based).

motion_and_interactions.hover: Explicit hover colors: hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5. Images slightly scale up (scale-105) on hover with overflow-hidden container.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties: transition-all duration-300 ease-out.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-in and slight slide-up for dashboard widgets and storyboard grids.

icons.usage: Use thin, scalable icons. Gold accent for active states.

hero_background.description: Abstract dark gold background for landing page or dramatic hero section
hero_background.usage: Use with heavy dark gradient overlay (bg-black/60) so text remains fully legible.

vintage_projector.usage: Feature showcase or 'Processing Video' empty state.

views_and_pages.landing: High visual impact. Asymmetric 'Tetris' grid. Large Outfit typography.
views_and_pages.dashboard_project_library: Control Room Grid. Minimalist list/grid of past projects with camera thumbnails.
views_and_pages.ingestion_studio: Multi-input area with distinct tabs (File, Link, Script, Voice). Large dropzone for files.
views_and_pages.character_studio: Grid of generated characters. Click to edit prompts or reference images.
views_and_pages.scene_storyboard: Sequence layout. Scrollable list of scenes with auto-generated images, narration text, and duration.
views_and_pages.generation_progress: Dark terminal/technical look. Progress bars with amber glow. Real-time rendering logs.
views_and_pages.final_film_assembly: Cinematic video player taking center stage (Theater mode). Download and share options below.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'framer-motion' for layout animations and page transitions.
Set up Tailwind config with 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' fonts from Google Fonts.
Implement a dark theme by default, ensuring all text has at least a 4.5:1 contrast ratio against the dark backgrounds.
Ensure the hero image uses the provided abstract dark gold background with a bg-black/60 overlay.
Build the dashboard using a 'Control Room' dense grid, maximizing space utilization.
Use data-testid on all interactive elements.
